name: vscode-dev-workbench
description: Use when the user wants to run the vscode.dev server locally and exercise the VS Code workbench or Agents window in the integrated browser against the local `microsoft/vscode` sources.

help me with vscode dev workbench

use vscode dev workbench from vscode
